text.title: Negotiation and Persuasion Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: map-interests
step.action: List interests for both sides (why, not what). Min 2 each.

step.name: compute-batna-zopa
step.action: Define BATNA (name + value), reserve point, estimate counterparty reserve.
step.decision-gate: If ZOPA negative, abort or change scope.

step.name: cite-objective-criteria
step.action: Find an external benchmark or precedent for each major term.
step.decision-gate: If no criterion, term is weak — find one or drop.

step.name: select-cialdini-levers
step.action: Pick 2-3 honest levers; reject manipulative framing.
